rows.missReason: Rule WOULD have fired 1d ago but signal was not emitted — likely scanner ran on smaller universe (e.g. CNX500 intraday vs MARKET_ALL post-close)
rows.recommendation: Expand intraday CNX500 cron to NIFTY_500 or add this symbol to MARKET_ALL universe

rows.missReason: Too wide a range (BB-w 17.63%) — not a coil setup. Pattern was momentum-driven, not pre-breakout.
rows.recommendation: Add momentum-style scanner: ret5d > 10% + vol > 2× + RSI > 60 firing

rows.missReason: Not in scanner universe (no candle history available)
rows.recommendation: Add to MARKET_ALL scan list; verify Angel ScripMaster has token
